scripts.lint:php: wp-env run cli sh -c "find /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/tsubakuro -name '*.php' -not -path '*/vendor/*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/dist/*' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l"
scripts.test:wp: wp-env run cli wp plugin activate tsubakuro && wp-env run cli wp eval-file /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/tsubakuro/tests/integration/wp-env-smoke.php
scripts.build:zip: wp-scripts plugin-zip && mkdir -p dist && mv tsubakuro.zip dist/
